master_token.description: Bearer token required for all REST API requests. Change from the default before deploying.
master_token.title: Master Token

allow_external_cwd.description: Allow callers to anchor sessions in an arbitrary host path via the `cwd` field on POST /api/sessions and POST /api/sessions/{id}/query. Off by default; enable only for trusted external workspace managers such as Grove that manage their own worktrees.
allow_external_cwd.title: Allow External Cwd

max_depth.description: Maximum nesting depth for sub-agent delegation (1 = no sub-agents).
max_depth.title: Max Depth

max_concurrent.description: Maximum number of sub-agents allowed to run concurrently.
max_concurrent.title: Max Concurrent

default_sub_model.description: Default LLM model for sub-agents. Falls back to the root agent's model when empty.
default_sub_model.title: Default Sub Model

allowed_models.description: Allowlist of model names sub-agents may use. Empty means all models are allowed.
allowed_models.title: Allowed Models

max_iters.description: Deprecated. The tool-use loop now runs until natural completion (model returns text without tool calls). This field is retained for API backward compatibility but is not enforced.
max_iters.title: Max Iters

sub_agent_max_steps.description: Deprecated. Sub-agents now run until natural completion. This field is retained for API backward compatibility but is not enforced. Safety is provided by session_step_budget, stall detection, and LLM timeouts.
sub_agent_max_steps.title: Sub Agent Max Steps

llm_call_timeout.description: Ceiling in seconds for a single model.ainvoke() call. Covers extended-thinking models (raised from 60s — bare timeouts were the largest single failure class). On timeout, the call is retried up to llm_call_retries times before cascading to fallback models.
llm_call_timeout.title: Llm Call Timeout

llm_call_retries.description: Maximum attempts for the primary model before cascading to fallback models (default 2 = one try + one retry). Each fallback model gets retry.fallback_retries attempts. A rescue model that wins is pinned for the rest of the run. Backoff/budget/circuit-breaker live under agent.retry.
llm_call_retries.title: Llm Call Retries

retry.description: Automatic LLM-call retry / fallback resilience knobs.

default_denied_tools.description: Tool IDs denied to all sub-agents by default (e.g. spawn_agent).
default_denied_tools.title: Default Denied Tools

edit_tool.description: File editing mechanism override: 'search_replace_block' (Aider-style SEARCH/REPLACE blocks) or 'structured_patch' (per-file exact string replacement). Leave empty (default) to auto-select based on the active model via llm.structured_patch_models.
edit_tool.title: Edit Tool

plan_mode_shell_allowlist.description: Shell command prefixes allowed during plan mode. Each entry matches a command at a word boundary (e.g. 'git log' matches 'git log --oneline' but not 'git logger'). Commands containing pipes, redirects, variable expansion, command substitution, or chaining (|, >, <, &, ;, $, backtick) are always rejected. Set to an empty list to disable shell in plan mode entirely.
plan_mode_shell_allowlist.title: Plan Mode Shell Allowlist

plan_mode_allow_mcp.description: Allow ALL user-enabled MCP tools (tools with kind='mcp') during plan mode. Matches Claude Code's permissive default and trusts the user's mcp.json configuration. Set to false to block MCP tools in plan mode regardless of their read-only status.
plan_mode_allow_mcp.title: Plan Mode Allow Mcp

web_ide.description: Optional 'Open in Web IDE' feature config (code-server containers).

tool_search.description: Deferred tool loading via on-demand schema fetching.

CLIConfig.description: Terminal CLI display and interaction settings.

disable_textual.description: Disable the Textual TUI and fall back to plain Rich output.
disable_textual.title: Disable Textual

approval_style.description: Tool-approval UI style: 'inline' (plain prompt), 'textual' (TUI dialog), or 'aider' (diff-style).
approval_style.title: Approval Style

CLIConfig.title: CLI

ChatConfig.description: Legacy config section kept for backward compatibility with app.json files.

port.description: TCP port for the legacy chat interface.
port.title: Port

address.description: Bind address for the legacy chat interface.
address.title: Address

ChatConfig.title: Chat

CompactionConfig.description:
Summarization prompt selection for conversation compaction.

``caveman_mode`` enables a rule-augmented prompt (inspired by the
``JuliusBrussee/caveman`` Claude Code skill) that instructs the
summarizer LLM to drop articles, filler, pleasantries, and hedging
while preserving code, paths, URLs, and error strings verbatim.
Reduces output tokens in the compaction summary without changing the
``<analysis>/<summary>`` response structure downstream parsers expect.

caveman_mode.description: Enable caveman-style terse summarization prompt. Drops articles, filler, pleasantries, and hedging in the compacted summary while preserving code, file paths, URLs, and error strings verbatim. Reduces compaction output tokens without changing the response structure downstream parsers expect.
caveman_mode.title: Caveman Mode

CompactionConfig.title: Compaction

ContextConfig.description: Context window selection and event filtering.

recent_event_limit.description: Maximum number of recent events injected into the context window.
recent_event_limit.title: Recent Event Limit

selection_threshold.description: Relevance score threshold (0.0-1.0) for the context selector to keep an event.
selection_threshold.title: Selection Threshold

selection_enabled.description: Enable LLM-based context event selection. When false, all recent events are used.
selection_enabled.title: Selection Enabled

context_selector_model.description: Model ID for context selection. Falls back to llm.default_model when empty.
context_selector_model.title: Context Selector Model

ContextConfig.title: Context

FallbackConfig.description:
Opt-in cross-model fallback policy.

Disabled by default so a run never fans out to a different model — with
different cost, latency, output style and prompt-cache behaviour — without
an explicit opt-in. When disabled, an error that is hopeless on the current
model (e.g. quota exhausted) halts cleanly for one-click recovery instead.

enabled.description: Enable automatic fallback to other models when the primary is exhausted or hits a hopeless-here error. Off by default.
enabled.title: Enabled

models.description: Ordered fallback model IDs, tried after the primary is exhausted.
models.title: Models

FallbackConfig.title: Fallback

enabled.description: Enable the Home Assistant tool for smart-home control.
enabled.title: Enabled

token.description: Long-lived access token for Home Assistant authentication.
token.title: Token

matcher.description: Optional fnmatch pattern to limit which tool IDs trigger this hook.
matcher.title: Matcher

timeout.description: Maximum seconds to wait for the hook to finish.
timeout.title: Timeout

HooksConfig.description: External shell hooks fired during the session lifecycle.

pre_tool_use.description: Hooks executed before each tool invocation.
pre_tool_use.title: Pre Tool Use

post_tool_use.description: Hooks executed after each tool invocation.
post_tool_use.title: Post Tool Use

on_session_start.description: Hooks executed when a new session begins.
on_session_start.title: On Session Start

on_session_end.description: Hooks executed when a session ends.
on_session_end.title: On Session End

on_event.description: Hooks executed (fire-and-forget) for every event appended to a session transcript. The matcher fnmatches the event type.
on_event.title: On Event

HooksConfig.title: Hooks

LLMConfig.description: LLM provider connection and model selection.

api_base.description: Optional base URL override. Leave empty for direct provider access (LiteLLM routes automatically from the model prefix). Set only when using a proxy (e.g. LiteLLM, Bifrost).
api_base.title: Api Base

api_key.description: API key for the LLM provider (e.g. Anthropic, OpenAI) or proxy master key.
api_key.title: Api Key

default_model.description: Model ID using 'provider/model' syntax. LiteLLM auto-routes to the right API endpoint. When using a proxy, adjust the prefix to match its routing.
default_model.title: Default Model

action_plan_model.description: Model ID for action-plan generation. Falls back to default_model when empty.
action_plan_model.title: Action Plan Model

tool_model.description: Model ID used by individual tools. Falls back to default_model when empty.
tool_model.title: Tool Model

title_model.description: Model ID for session-title generation. Falls back to default_model when empty.
title_model.title: Title Model

compact_models.description: Priority-ordered list of models for context compaction. On failure, the next model in the list is tried. The keyword "default" resolves to the running agent's model. Example: ["anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "default"]
compact_models.title: Compact Models

fallback_models.description: Legacy ordered list of fallback model IDs. Prefer 'fallback' (typed, explicit opt-in). A non-empty value here is still honored for backward compatibility (treated as fallback enabled).
fallback_models.title: Fallback Models

proxy_model_prefix.description: LiteLLM provider prefix prepended to model names when api_base is set. LiteLLM strips this prefix before forwarding the model name to the proxy, so the proxy receives the model ID it advertises in /v1/models. Leave as 'openai' for LiteLLM proxy, Bifrost, and OpenRouter. Only relevant when api_base is configured.
proxy_model_prefix.title: Proxy Model Prefix

reasoning_effort.description: Reasoning effort hint for supported models. One of low, medium, high, none, or empty.
reasoning_effort.title: Reasoning Effort

reasoning_effort_models.description: Model name patterns that support the reasoning_effort parameter.
reasoning_effort_models.title: Reasoning Effort Models

structured_patch_models.description: Model IDs (or glob prefixes ending in '*') that prefer the structured_patch edit tool over search_replace_block. Runtime override layer ON TOP of the controllable model→tool-variant map (mewbo_core/prompts/model_variants.yaml), which now holds the built-in defaults (GPT-5/o3/o4/Codex/GPT-4); only set this to override or extend without editing that file.
structured_patch_models.title: Structured Patch Models

LLMConfig.title: Language Model

servers.description: Override or extend built-in server definitions. Set {"pyright": {"disabled": true}} to disable a built-in, or add custom servers with command/extensions/root_markers.
servers.title: Servers

enabled.description: Enable Langfuse tracing for all LLM calls.
enabled.title: Enabled

project_id.description: Langfuse project ID for constructing dashboard URLs.
project_id.title: Project Id

uri.description: MongoDB connection URI (includes host, port, credentials).
uri.title: Uri

database.description: MongoDB database name for session storage.
database.title: Database

policy_path.description: Path to a JSON or TOML permission policy file. Empty uses built-in defaults.
policy_path.title: Policy Path

approval_mode.description: Default approval mode: 'ask' prompts the user, 'allow' auto-approves, 'deny' blocks.
approval_mode.title: Approval Mode

enabled_plugins.description: Plugin names to enable. Empty = all installed plugins. Format: 'plugin-name' or 'plugin-name@marketplace'.
enabled_plugins.title: Enabled Plugins

marketplaces.description: Marketplace catalogs holding a marketplace.json plugin index, on any git host. Each entry is a full git URL (https/ssh/git, or scp-style git@host:owner/repo), a 'host/owner/repo' shorthand, or a bare 'owner/repo' (cloned from marketplace_default_host).
marketplaces.title: Marketplaces

marketplace_default_host.description: Default git host for bare 'owner/repo' marketplace entries. Full URLs and 'host/owner/repo' entries ignore this.
marketplace_default_host.title: Marketplace Default Host

install_path.description: Override install path for Mewbo-managed plugins. Defaults to $MEWBO_HOME/plugins/ (via resolve_mewbo_home).
install_path.title: Install Path

ProjectConfig.description: A project directory exposed to the REST API for session scoping.

path.description: Absolute path to the project root. Tilde (~) is expanded.
path.title: Path

description.description: Short human-readable description of the project.
description.title: Description

ProjectConfig.title: Project

enabled.description: Enable a reflection LLM pass after tool execution to verify results.
enabled.title: Enabled

model.description: Model ID for the reflection pass. Falls back to llm.default_model when empty.
model.title: Model

RetryConfig.description:
Automatic LLM-call retry / fallback resilience knobs.

Same-model retry hardening (full-jitter backoff, circuit breaker, retry
budget, wall-clock deadline, doom-loop halt) is always on; cross-model
fallback is opt-in via ``llm.fallback``. Defaults are calibrated from
production agent loops, not the tighter vendor-SDK defaults.

backoff_base.description: Base seconds for full-jitter backoff: random(0, min(cap, base*2^(n-1))).
backoff_base.title: Backoff Base

retry_after_cap.description: Upper bound applied to a server Retry-After before sleeping on it.
retry_after_cap.title: Retry After Cap

turn_deadline.description: Wall-clock seconds budget for one logical LLM call across all retries and fallbacks. Checked before each attempt. 0 disables.
turn_deadline.title: Turn Deadline

fallback_retries.description: Attempts per fallback model after the primary is exhausted.
fallback_retries.title: Fallback Retries

circuit_breaker_threshold.description: Consecutive per-model failures before that model is cooled down and skipped (when an alternative exists). 0 disables.
circuit_breaker_threshold.title: Circuit Breaker Threshold

circuit_breaker_cooldown.description: Seconds a model is skipped after tripping the circuit breaker.
circuit_breaker_cooldown.title: Circuit Breaker Cooldown

budget_capacity.description: Token-bucket retry budget. Retries stop once the bucket drops to half capacity, so a sustained outage fails fast instead of storming.
budget_capacity.title: Budget Capacity

doom_loop_threshold.description: Halt cleanly when the model repeats the same tool + identical input this many times in a row (no progress). 0 disables.
doom_loop_threshold.title: Doom Loop Threshold

RetryConfig.title: Retry

log_level.description: Logging verbosity. One of DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL.
log_level.title: Log Level

log_style.description: Log output style for the core engine (empty for default).
log_style.title: Log Style

cli_log_style.description: Rich console log theme for the CLI (dark or light).
cli_log_style.title: Cli Log Style

preflight_enabled.description: Run connectivity checks for LLM, Langfuse, and Home Assistant on startup.
preflight_enabled.title: Preflight Enabled

cache_dir.description: Directory for tool caches. Defaults to $MEWBO_HOME/cache.
cache_dir.title: Cache Dir

session_dir.description: Directory for session transcripts. Defaults to $MEWBO_HOME/sessions.
session_dir.title: Session Dir

result_export_dir.description: Directory for large tool result exports. Empty to disable.
result_export_dir.title: Result Export Dir

projects_home.description: Directory for virtual project folders. Defaults to $MEWBO_HOME/projects.
projects_home.title: Projects Home

ScgConfig.description: Operator-facing knobs for the Source Capability Graph (agentic search).

enabled.description: Master switch for the SCG feature (source mapping and orchestrated agentic-search runs).
enabled.title: Enabled

ScgConfig.title: SCG

ScgTierModelsConfig.description:
Per-tier model mapping — the tier picks the brain, not just the budget.

A tier maps to the LLM that drives the whole run (orchestrator session AND
its probe sub-agents, which inherit the session model). An empty string
falls back to ``llm.default_model``. An explicit per-request ``model``
override (where the endpoint offers one) always wins over the tier map.

fast.description: Model for `fast` tier runs (the tier still sets the low-latency budget).
fast.title: Fast

auto.description: Model for `auto` tier runs (the tier still sets the balanced budget).
auto.title: Auto

deep.description: Model for `deep` tier runs (the tier still sets the exhaustive budget).
deep.title: Deep

ScgTierModelsConfig.title: Tier models

ScgTraversalConfig.description: Traversal defaults for SCG search (the per-run tier budget knob).

default_tier.description: Default search tier — one budget knob over decomposition depth and probe fan-out. Overridable per run.
default_tier.title: Default Tier

tier_models.description: Which LLM each search tier runs on (fast/auto/deep).

ScgTraversalConfig.title: Traversal

mongodb.description: MongoDB connection settings (used when driver is 'mongodb').

default_context_window.description: Default context window size in tokens used when the model is not listed in model_context_windows.
default_context_window.title: Default Context Window

auto_compact_threshold.description: Fraction of the context window (0.0-1.0) that triggers automatic conversation compaction.
auto_compact_threshold.title: Auto Compact Threshold

model_context_windows.description: Override only: per-model context window in tokens. Keys are model names (with or without provider prefix). The authoritative source is LiteLLM's model catalogue; populate this only to cap below the model's real max, or for models LiteLLM doesn't know yet.
model_context_windows.title: Model Context Windows

ToolSearchConfig.description:
Deferred tool loading via on-demand schema fetching.

When ``mode='on'``, MCP tool schemas (and any spec with
``metadata.deferred=True``) are stripped from the initial ``bind_tools``
call and surfaced to the model by name only via
``<available-deferred-tools>``. The model fetches schemas it actually
needs by calling the built-in ``tool_search`` tool. Mirrors Claude
Code's ``ToolSearchTool`` mechanism — saves substantial context tokens
on sessions with many MCP servers connected.

mode.description: 'off' keeps every tool's schema in the initial bind. 'on' always defers MCP tools and any spec with metadata.deferred=True; the model loads schemas on demand via tool_search. 'auto' defers only when the number of deferrable tools exceeds auto_threshold — so lean / zero-MCP sessions keep verbatim binding and pay nothing, while many-MCP sessions are spared ~240 tokens per tool every turn.
mode.title: Mode

auto_threshold.description: In 'auto' mode, defer tool schemas only when more than this many deferrable tools (MCP + metadata.deferred specs) are registered. Ignored when mode is 'off' or 'on'.
auto_threshold.title: Auto Threshold

ToolSearchConfig.title: Tool Search

WebIdeConfig.description: Config for the per-session code-server "Open in Web IDE" feature.

proxy_url.description: Base URL the API uses to reach the ide-proxy for readiness probes. The default suits a host-networked API, where the proxy is published on loopback 127.0.0.1:5126. A bridge-networked API (e.g. one joined to extra Docker networks via a compose override) cannot reach that loopback: attach it to the `network` above and point this at the proxy's in-network name, e.g. http://mewbo-ide-proxy:8080.
proxy_url.title: Proxy Url

WebIdeConfig.title: Web IDE

WikiConfig.description: Operator-facing knobs for the wiki subsystem.

default_model.description: Model the wiki picker pre-selects for indexing (the wizard). Overrides ``llm.default_model`` for the wizard. Empty string means: fall back to ``llm.default_model``.
default_model.title: Default Model

default_qa_model.description: Model the Q&A composer pre-selects. Typically smaller/faster than ``default_model`` because Q&A is a tight read-only loop where latency matters more than depth. Empty string means: fall back to ``default_model``, then to ``llm.default_model``.
default_qa_model.title: Default Qa Model

default_depth.description: Indexing depth the wizard pre-selects. Empty string means: use the wizard's own default (``comprehensive``).
default_depth.title: Default Depth

default_language.description: Language code the wizard pre-selects (e.g. ``en``, ``es``). Empty string means: use the wizard's own default.
default_language.title: Default Language

memory.description: Multiplex memory-layer knobs (atomic insights over the graph).

WikiConfig.title: Wiki

WikiEmbeddingConfig.description: Embedding settings for the wiki indexer.

enabled.description: When false, ``wiki_build_graph`` skips embedding generation and retrieval falls back to BM25 + graph traversal only.
enabled.title: Enabled

model.description: Embedding model ID routed through the LLM proxy. Must support the OpenAI ``/v1/embeddings`` shape (LiteLLM normalises Gemini and others to this shape). Pin a fast model here to speed up indexing — embedding is per-node and runs synchronously.
model.title: Model

batch_size.description: Batch size when embedding nodes in chunks.
batch_size.title: Batch Size

WikiEmbeddingConfig.title: Embedding

WikiMemoryConfig.description: Knobs for the multiplex memory layer (atomic insights over the graph).

enabled.description: Master switch for the memory layer (gates wiki_submit_insight).
enabled.title: Enabled

model.description: Chat model for condense + LLM dedup on the human/REST/MCP path. Empty → falls back to default_qa_model, then default_model.
model.title: Model

max_insight_chars.description: Hard cap on a memory note's length.
max_insight_chars.title: Max Insight Chars

dedup_k.description: kNN candidate window for fuzzy + LLM dedup tiers.
dedup_k.title: Dedup K

dedup_cosine.description: Cosine floor for the LLM dedup tier.
dedup_cosine.title: Dedup Cosine

fuzzy_jaccard.description: Jaccard floor for the fuzzy dedup tier.
fuzzy_jaccard.title: Fuzzy Jaccard

hub_degree.description: Degree above which an anchor is hub-damped.
hub_degree.title: Hub Degree

expansion_hops.description: Structural hops to expand from an anchor.
expansion_hops.title: Expansion Hops

WikiMemoryConfig.title: Memory

WikiRefreshConfig.description: Thresholds for the on-demand incremental refresh.

default_mode.description: Default re-index strategy when none is requested.
default_mode.title: Default Mode

drift_keep.description: Cosine ≥ this keeps a memory anchor (no LLM).
drift_keep.title: Drift Keep

drift_invalidate.description: Cosine < this invalidates a memory anchor.
drift_invalidate.title: Drift Invalidate

new_page_min.description: Uncovered public symbols to propose a new page.
new_page_min.title: New Page Min

require_scope_confirm.description: Require a human gate on the scope preview before the act phase.
require_scope_confirm.title: Require Scope Confirm

WikiRefreshConfig.title: Refresh

description: Typed configuration for the Mewbo runtime.

wiki.description: Wiki subsystem defaults and embedding behavior.

scg.description: Source Capability Graph feature gate and search-tier default.

hooks.description: External hooks fired during the session lifecycle (command or http).

channels.description: Chat platform channel adapters (nextcloud-talk, slack, etc.).
channels.title: Channels

projects.description: Named project directories exposed to the REST API for session scoping.
